title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Baxter India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Baxter India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Baxter India in Nashik offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Baxter India:
Baxter India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Baxter India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
